original_title: Update hpc-watchdog.sh for current model deployment. infrastructure/hpc-watchdog.sh checks hardcoded, outdated endpoints: wrong model names, wrong ports (8080 vs 8081), missing vasp-03. Update to match current 5-model zoo. See audit issue 6.1.
required_outcomes: Update hpc-watchdog.sh for current model deployment. infrastructure/hpc-watchdog.sh checks hardcoded, outdated endpoints: wrong model names, wrong ports (8080 vs 8081), missing vasp-03. Update to match current 5-model zoo. See audit issue 6.1.

original_title: Fix deploy-dogfood.sh lockfile deletion anti-pattern. deploy-dogfood.sh line 59 deletes /tmp/dogfood-loop.lock, but dogfood-loop.sh comments warn 'IMPORTANT: Never delete the lockfile\! flock works on inodes, not paths.' Deleting creates race conditions with concurrent loops. Fix: only kill processes, let flock release naturally. See audit issue 6.2.
required_outcomes: Fix deploy-dogfood.sh lockfile deletion anti-pattern. deploy-dogfood.sh line 59 deletes /tmp/dogfood-loop.lock, but dogfood-loop.sh comments warn 'IMPORTANT: Never delete the lockfile\! flock works on inodes, not paths.' Deleting creates race conditions with concurrent loops. Fix: only kill processes, let flock release naturally. See audit issue 6.2.

original_title:
TensorZero Autopilot for self-improving swarm. Build a concrete TensorZero Autopilot loop for the swarm so self-dogfood can analyze historical outcomes, generate optimization targets, create experiment-ready artifacts, and eventually promote winning prompt/model variants automatically.

Quality Gates
- cargo check -p swarm-agents
- cargo clippy
required_outcomes:
TensorZero Autopilot for self-improving swarm. Build a concrete TensorZero Autopilot loop for the swarm so self-dogfood can analyze historical outcomes, generate optimization targets, create experiment-ready artifacts, and eventually promote winning prompt/model variants automatically.

Quality Gates
- cargo check -p swarm-agents
- cargo clippy

original_title:
US-003: Generate experiment-ready variant recommendations. As an operator, I need Autopilot to turn its analysis into candidate prompt/model experiments so I can review or run adaptive tests instead of hand-authoring every variant.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Generate machine-readable experiment recommendations from the Autopilot analysis outputs.
- Include p
